strengths: 16+ years full-stack experience exceeds 6+ requirement; currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq actively building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Core stack proficiency: TypeScript, Node.js, React all explicitly demonstrated across multiple senior roles (Optilyz, RIDE, current); AWS CDK and Docker experience confirmed
Architectural excellence: Multiple Staff Engineer titles, founded open-source GISCollective platform, organized TDD workshops and mentored teams in software craftsmanship
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite it being primary backend framework; experience is broader Node.js but framework-specific knowledge gap
Testing framework expertise gap: no mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright; resume shows TDD philosophy and created test libraries (Trial, Fluent-Asserts) but not the required frameworks
Security expertise not demonstrated: no explicit mention of authentication, authorization, or security best practices in resume despite being required
response.justification: Strong candidate with exceptional depth and breadth. Current role at re:cinq directly aligns (Staff Engineer, full-stack, AI agents, TypeScript, Node.js). Architecture skills proven across 16+ years and multiple Staff positions. Core gaps are specific tools (Nest.js, Vitest, authentication/security practices) rather than foundational knowledge—learnable for someone at this seniority level. MIT degree and demonstrated ability to build systems end-to-end across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains. TDD background is strong even if specific testing frameworks aren't listed.
